name: Fried Rabbit in Breadcrumbs
recipeIngredient: 4 pounds rabbit, cleaned and cut into serving pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In one bowl, mix together 3 tablespoons milk, flour, salt, and black pepper.
2. In another bowl, beat the egg with water.
3. In a third bowl, combine the fresh breadcrumbs.
4. Dip each rabbit piece first in the egg mixture, then coat it thoroughly in the breadcrumb mixture.
5. Heat vegetable oil in a large frying pan to 360°F (175°C), or until a small cube of dry bread browns in about 50 seconds when dropped into the oil.
6. Fry the rabbit pieces for 20 minutes, or until tender when pierced with a fork. Remove from the pan and drain on paper towels.
7. Arrange the fried rabbit on a serving dish, garnished with parsley sprigs. Serve immediately.
This can be served with sauteed potatoes and any fresh green vegetables.
